title: Update authentication credentials to 'Sayem Ahtesham' and 'sayem_web_deployment'

requirements.text: Update the hardcoded authentication credentials in the backend from username 'sayemahtesham' and password '12345678' to username 'Sayem Ahtesham' and password 'sayem_web_deployment'

quotes: Change the username and password Username . Sayem Ahtesham Password . sayem_web_deployment

acceptanceCriteria: Backend authentication validates username as 'Sayem Ahtesham' (case-sensitive)
Old credentials 'sayemahtesham'/'12345678' no longer authenticate successfully
Test creation requires the new credentials to succeed

requirements.text: Update the frontend authentication hook to use the new hardcoded credentials: username 'Sayem Ahtesham' and password 'sayem_web_deployment'

quotes: Change the username and password Username . Sayem Ahtesham Password . sayem_web_deployment

acceptanceCriteria: Frontend authentication validates against username 'Sayem Ahtesham' and password 'sayem_web_deployment'
Login modal accepts and successfully authenticates with the new credentials
Old credentials no longer work in the login modal
Session storage stores the new credentials correctly after successful login

constraints: Do not change the authentication mechanism, only update the credential values
Keep the existing session-based authentication flow intact
nonGoals: Adding multi-user support or database-backed authentication
Adding password reset or recovery functionality
